---
title: Generated Catalogs Workflow
description: How provider aggregate files are generated and checked
---

# Generated Catalogs Workflow

Provider aggregate files are generated by `self/subcortex/providers/scripts/generate-provider-aggregates.mjs`. The script discovers certified leaves under `self/subcortex/providers/src/providers/`, validates the required files, sorts leaves deterministically, and writes root-level catalog files.

## Generated Files

```text
self/subcortex/providers/src/provider-definitions.ts
self/subcortex/providers/src/provider-adapters.ts
self/subcortex/providers/src/provider-factories.ts
```

These files carry a generated header. Do not hand-edit them.

## Generated Exports

| File | Important exports |
|---|---|
| `provider-definitions.ts` | `PROVIDER_DEFINITIONS`, `ProviderVendorKey`, `BootstrapProviderKey`, `resolveProviderDefinition(...)` |
| `provider-adapters.ts` | `CERTIFIED_PROVIDER_ADAPTER_MODULES`, `CertifiedProviderAdapterKey`, leaf adapter re-exports |
| `provider-factories.ts` | `CERTIFIED_PROVIDER_FACTORIES`, `CertifiedProviderFactoryVendorKey`, `resolveProviderFactory(...)` |

## Workflow

1. Add or update a provider leaf under `src/providers/<vendor>/`.
2. Run `pnpm --filter @nous/subcortex-providers run generate:providers`.
3. Run `pnpm --filter @nous/subcortex-providers run check:generated`.
4. Commit generated files when the provider leaf changed.

The generated catalogs keep the certified driver roster deterministic, reduce central hand-edited maps, and prevent normal provider additions from changing runtime branch code.

## Discovery Rules

The generator ignores hidden directories, `__tests__`, and `fixtures`. Provider leaf directories must match lowercase ASCII kebab-case and include:

- `definition.ts`
- `adapter.ts`
- `provider.ts`
- `index.ts`

Generated aliases must be unique after kebab-case names are converted to camelCase.
